channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US forces kill 4 people in latest strike on vessels in eastern Pacific
item.description: The killings mark the fourth US deadly strike in the past four days on vessels in the eastern Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Israeli attacks kill 11, including two children, in day of strikes on Gaza
item.description: A three-year-old and a 14-year-old were among those killed in Israel's latest strikes on northern Gaza.

item.title: Haiti’s Culture Ministry fires workers over citadel stampede that killed 25
item.description: At least nine people have been arrested following the stampede, including police officers and ministry employees.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says war ‘close to over’ as Hormuz blockade continues
item.description: US president says second round of talks could be held in Pakistan as naval blockade of Iranian ports continues.

item.title: Israel and Lebanon hold rare talks in Washington, DC, amid Iran war
item.description: The meeting marks the first direct talks between the two sides, though US officials say more time is needed.

item.title: Israeli attack kills several people in Gaza refugee camp
item.description: Palestinians in Gaza recorded victims of an Israeli strike on the Shati refugee camp being rushed to a medical facility.

item.title: How US blockade on Iran will worsen energy crisis
item.description: With the US military blockade of Iranian ports now in force, global energy markets are already reacting.

item.title: Why are global views of the US getting worse?
item.description: We discuss the global standing of the US after launching war against Iran and years of worsening views of the nation.

item.title: Pakistan PM headed to Riyadh and Ankara amid prospect of new US-Iran talks
item.description: Sharif pushing for further negotiations. Trump says talks could resume in Pakistan in next two days.

item.title: Israeli strike on Gaza police car kills child
item.description: An Israeli airstrike on a police vehicle in Gaza City killed at least four people, including a three-year-old child.
